title: Shared cross-platform runtime configuration
description: Platform-neutral config contract. Android and iOS may store values differently but key names and meaning are equivalent. Defaults reflect 2026-05-30 SM8750 measurements.

asr.description: ASR behind a shared AsrEngine interface. Phase A = platform OS recognizer; Phase B = owned sherpa-onnx model. See docs/design/asr_selection.md.

engine.description: Phase A 'platform' = Android SpeechRecognizer (on-device) / iOS SpeechAnalyzer|SFSpeechRecognizer. Phase B 'sherpa-onnx' = owned offline model.

mode.description: Platform recognizers stream partials. (Owned chunked Whisper would set 'chunked'.)

endpoint_silence_ms.description: Silence before declaring end-of-speech; directly sets latency stage 1.

require_on_device.description: Use OS on-device recognition only (createOnDeviceSpeechRecognizer / supportsOnDeviceRecognition).

allow_network_fallback.description: If on-device unavailable: false = block ASR (preserve offline claim); true = network fallback WITH a user-visible indicator (offline claim relaxed).

max_response_tokens.description: Hard response cap for SPOKEN UX (~120 tok ≈ a few sentences; 256 is a long monologue at 22 tok/s). Latency/thermal cap.

model_dir.description: Directory of graph-prepared component DLCs/CoreML models.

flow_steps.description: K: flow-matching steps; dominant TTS latency knob. K=6 chosen by listening (K=4 under-converged, K=6 matches K=8). Supertonic default 8, range 5-12.

chunk_latent_frames.description: Short-chunk latent length (~1.5s) for low first-audio latency.

first_audio_p95_ms.description: ASR-final → first semantic audio P95 target.

barge_in_stop_ms.description: Max time to stop audible playback after barge-in (mid-clause).

use_os_thermal_state.description: Prefer OS thermal status (Android PowerManager.getCurrentThermalStatus / iOS ProcessInfo.thermalState) as the primary degrade signal; raw zone temps are a secondary hint.

thermal_hysteresis_c.description: Must cool this far below a threshold before clearing the degrade level (prevents flapping; init spike measured ~103 °C, steady ~70 °C).
